Popover content & behavior.question: How should popovers dismiss?
Popover content & behavior.answer: Click-outside + Esc (standard popover: click cluster to open, click anywhere else or Esc to close, one popover at a time)

Popover content & behavior.question: What shows in the LEFT popover?
Popover content & behavior.answer: Recent projects list (click project name → recents, click one = switch project, branch read-only detail, no branch switcher in L1)

Popover content & behavior.question: What shows in the CENTER popover?
Popover content & behavior.answer: Pane detail card (focused pane full path/cwd, shell name+version, PID, pane index, running command if any — read-only info)

Popover content & behavior.question: Component structure?
Popover content & behavior.answer: One generic Popover component (single <Popover anchor={el} content={...}> reused by all clusters, consistent positioning/dismiss/animation)
